title: Review: implement wolfhsm SecretStore and WritableSecretStore
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — client_id collision is a real footgun for multi-tenant wolfHSM deployments; the magic constant for NOTFOUND is a latent maintenance trap. Both are fixable before the first real wolfHSM deployment.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) cannot run integration tests against real wolfHSM hardware/simulator — the NVM round-trip logic has never been exercised; (2) wolfhsm crate internals (nvm_list return value, error variant shapes) verified by reading source but not by running; (3) client_id=1 collision behavior on wolfHSM server is untested. Would raise confidence if: integration test against wolfHSM posix-sim running locally, covering get/put/refresh round-trips and error paths.
